deliberate_omissions: Some gap responses are confirmed and substantive
Some responses are vague or deferred
An invalid agent annotation cites fabricated evidence

brief.rationale: Partial answers may improve identity/users and the brief may narrate the apparent app/process, but vague scope and acceptance responses must keep downstream readiness constrained.

rejection_scenarios.name: fabricated annotation rejected without mutating discovery
output_contains: evidence quote is not found verbatim

blocked_commands.name: specs blocked while answered and partially closed gaps remain

golden_queries.query: what acceptance signal confirms the helper is done
golden_queries.rationale: Acceptance for the ops review helper is undescribed.

golden_queries.query: frontend surface roles and states for the helper
golden_queries.rationale: Frontend surface of the helper is undescribed.

golden_queries.query: what is the success metric target users and scope of the helper
golden_queries.rationale: Distractor-competitive query (echoes success/metric/users/scope vocabulary shared with the multi-domain distractor corpus): hash retrieval misses the correct section AND surfaces a wrong-domain distractor. Falsifiable target IMP-121+ must lift while keeping distractors out.

golden_queries.query: fuente de la metrica linea base y metodo de medicion del asistente
golden_queries.rationale: Cross-lingual section query; expected to FAIL with hash embeddings (no semantics) and become a hard gate once a semantic local embedder is active (IMP-029/121).
